concepts_used.title: ARIMA 模型
concepts_used.how_used: 使用时间序列分析建立汽油价格预测模型，采用自回归形式，包含滞后项和原油价格作为外生变量。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Time series analysis is a frequently-used method to expect the gasoline price trend. It can be expressed as: ... Equation ②

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 利用2011年数据通过最小二乘法估计预测模型中的系数，得到具体数值。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: By adopting the data obtained from 2011and the comparison in different aspects, we can obtain the gas price prediction model: Ĝ = 0.0398+1.6002g +−0.7842g +0.1207g i+ 0.4147g − 0.5107g +0.1703g +ε̂.

concepts_used.title: 移动平均法
concepts_used.how_used: 利用两周和四周的平均价格进行预测，构建了基于平均价格的预测模型。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We innovatively utilize the average prices of the continuous two weeks to predict the next two week’s average price; similarly, employ the four-week-long average prices to forecast the average price of four weeks later.

concepts_used.title: 误差度量（R²/相对误差/RMSE）
concepts_used.how_used: 通过比较预测成本与实际历史成本，计算最低总成本来验证模型的有效性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: we had calculated the lowest cost of filling up in 2012 when traveling 100 miles a week is 637.24 dollars ... while the lowest cost when traveling 200 miles a week is 1283.5 dollars. These two values are very close to the ideal value of cost on the basis of the historical figure, which are 635.24 dollars and 1253.5 dollars respectively.

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用流程图展示加油决策过程，帮助读者理解模型逻辑。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The process for decision can be shown through the following flow chart. Chart 1

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 明确列出了5条模型假设，包括消费者理性、忽略汽油重量差异等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 1. Assumption a) Assume the consumer always buy gasoline according to the rule of minimum cost. b) Ignore the difference of the gasoline weight. c) Ignore the oil wear on the way to gas stations. d) Assume the tank is empty at the beginning of the following models. e) Apply the past data of crude oil price to predict the future price of gasoline.

concepts_used.title: MATLAB 编程基础
concepts_used.how_used: 使用MATLAB进行模型求解和成本计算，附录中提供了主要程序代码。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: we had calculated the lowest cost of filling up in 2012 when traveling 100 miles a week is 637.24 dollars with the help of MATLAB

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：摘要、重述、假设、模型建立、求解、检验、总结。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Catalogue Abstract, Restatement, Assumption, Definitions of Variables and Models, Train and Test Model by 2011 dataset, etc.
